D2 Vision L4 Analyze Reference

The Dark Adaptation Curve

slide the minutes in the dark and watch the threshold drop through the rod-cone break

In darkness the cones recover quickly to a modest floor, then the slower rods overtake them at the rod-cone break and reach a far lower threshold.

Slide the time spent in the dark. Watch the faint cone branch bottom out within minutes, then the rod branch cross below it at the break near 7-10 minutes, carrying sensitivity far deeper.
